summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the MAJOR template system rewrite. Backend returns EXACTLY 20 structurally distinct archetypes per category (not 120+ color variants). All features working correctly. Fixed minor UI text issue.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed projects during testing (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Template system rewrite complete. Each category now returns exactly 20 structurally distinct archetypes (not 120+ color variants). Colors are chosen AFTER template selection via PalettePickerModal. Key endpoints: GET /api/websites/categories/{cat}/layouts (20 layouts), GET /api/websites/palettes (10 palettes), POST /api/websites/projects/{id}/apply-palette. All archetypes have NEUTRAL theme with primary=#FFD700 (gold). Different categories produce different content for same archetype (restaurant=menu, jewelry=products, salon=services).

frontend_tests.category_picker: PASSED - 20 category cards with '20 تصميم' badges
frontend_tests.layout_browser: PASSED - 20 archetype cards with density/hero/section badges
frontend_tests.palette_picker_modal: PASSED - Opens after confirm, shows 10 palettes
frontend_tests.structural_differences: PASSED - Different archetypes produce visually different layouts
